query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN zoneCode IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_zoneCode FROM warehouseLocations LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_inv, SUM(CASE WHEN locationZone IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_locationZone FROM inventory LIMIT 1;
